analysis.name: Bedrock
analysis.summary: BR是Bedrock DAO的治理代币，近期因BTCFi叙事、交易所上线及高交易量而上涨，但链上存在同名仿盘风险，需区分。

recommendation.invalidation: 链上仿盘价格归零或主流CEX上线后流动性枯竭

catalysts: BR/USDT交易量5天超132亿美元，市场关注度高
Bedrock推出PoSL机制及BR空投检查器

latestNews.title: Bedrock's BR/USDT Pool Trading Volume Surpasses $13.2 Billion with Over 341,000 Traders in 5 Days
latestNews.reason: 高交易量表明市场活跃，吸引更多投资者

latestNews.title: MEXC Introduces Bedrock (BR) Listing with Spot & Futures
latestNews.reason: 交易所上线增加流动性和曝光

latestNews.title: Bedrock Introduces Proof of Staking Liquidity (PoSL) and Launches BR Airdrop Checker
latestNews.reason: 新机制和空投吸引用户参与

fundamentals: Bedrock是多链Liquid Staking协议，支持BTC、ETH等资产
BR是治理代币，通过锁定为veBR获得投票权
总供应量10亿，流通2.5125亿，流通市值约3981万美元
项目已上线Binance、MEXC等主流交易所
marketRead: 24h涨幅13.3%，7天涨幅22.5%，30天涨幅31%，处于上升趋势
链上pumpfun仿盘BR/SOL 24h跌77%，流动性极低，需警惕同名代币
主流CEX上BR交易量巨大，但价格波动可能受大户影响
risks: 链上存在同名仿盘（pumpfun上的BR/SOL），极易混淆
全稀释估值1.58亿美元，流通市值仅3981万，未来解锁压力大
治理代币价值捕获能力有限，主要依赖生态发展
watchlist: 链上仿盘价格是否归零
sourceNotes: 链上数据来自pumpfun，与主流CEX的BR非同一资产
新闻来源包括FXLeaders、CoinMarketCap等，部分日期较早

profile.name: Bedrock
profile.description: Bedrock DAO is a governance framework for managing decisions within the Bedrock ecosystem. It enables BR token holders to participate in governance by converting BR into veBR, a voting escrow token. Governance decisions include protocol parameters, incentive structures, and liquidity allocation. The governance system is based on veBR, which is obtained by locking BR tokens at a 1:1 ratio. The longer the lock duration, the greater the voting power. veBR holders vote on governance proposals, including gauge allocations that determine incentive distribution across liquidity pools.
